emad , don't wastemy time with these e-mails that

regarding the dock

From: Greg Hernandez [mailto:ghernandez@emgroup.net]

Sent: Wednesday, February 22, 2006 9:43 AM
To: Emad Hanna
Subject: Dock Expansion Estimate

Emad,

Sorry for not getting back to you yesterday. The
meeting I was walking
into got extended and connected with another one
that finished at 8:30
pm.

I checked with our estimator and he was promised the
quote for this
upcoming Friday. I am planning to send it to your
attention together
with the requested documentation.

Please advice.

Regards, Greg
